title: acalypha psamofila
intro: Acalypha psamofila, also known as the sand leaved cup plant, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acalypha psamofila include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent and to reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Acalypha psamofila can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
